description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a mandarin collar with adjustable collar button tab, an insert pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding above the pocket, buttoned placket, print and a curved hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThe classic appeal of natural fabrics combined with vintage cuts is back with a vengeance.
